MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-03-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN MATEO AND MARIN COUNTIES, INC.'S MOTION FOR ORDER SETTING EXPERT FEES IS GRANTED. (CCP SEC. 2034.470.) THE REASONABLE EXPERT FEES FOR THE DEPOSITION OF DR. ANNA RATINER SHALL BE $730 PER HOUR. THE HOURLY RATE FOR THE DEPOSITION OF DR. DAVID EHSAN SHALL BE $1000. NO FEES SHALL BE PAID FOR PREPARATION TIME. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR# 5976 (302/EHG)
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-06-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
